description: 1. Guaranteed antibacterial treatment Hygiotech2. Classical cut, supple fabric that follows movements, cotton feel that allows freedom of movement3. Resistance to wear and tear, long lasting, keeps its shape4. Equarea technology for quick moisture transfer5. Composition is 100% polyesterPlay till you drop and run till you can run no more! These t-shirts will never give you away even on the hottest of the day because of its unique Hygiotech treatment which provides an antibacterial shield and a super absorbent texture. Wear it or you'll never know it!
